non_goal: not an external tool execution baseline

obligation_rationale.identity: A component inventory must name each package.
obligation_rationale.version: A component inventory must bind each package to a resolved coordinate.
obligation_rationale.source: An auditable inventory needs the package source or index namespace.
obligation_rationale.manager_metadata: The lock manager metadata identifies how the lock semantics are interpreted.
obligation_rationale.manifest_agreement: The lock inventory must cover the manifest's default direct requirements.

obligation_rationale.identity: A vulnerability lookup key must include a package name.
obligation_rationale.version: A vulnerability lookup key must include a resolved version.
obligation_rationale.source: The package source disambiguates ecosystem and namespace.
obligation_rationale.dependency_edge: Reachability-aware vulnerability matching needs dependency relations.
obligation_rationale.manager_metadata: The lock manager metadata identifies the dependency semantics.
obligation_rationale.manifest_agreement: The lock must cover the manifest requirements being audited.

obligation_rationale.version: Reconstruction requires an exact resolved coordinate.
obligation_rationale.source: Reconstruction requires a source or index anchor.
obligation_rationale.integrity: Reconstruction requires hash, pinned source, or local-source integrity evidence.
obligation_rationale.resolver_epoch: Reconstruction depends on the lock format or resolver epoch.
obligation_rationale.manager_metadata: Manager metadata identifies lock semantics and groups.
obligation_rationale.manifest_agreement: The lock must cover the manifest requirements being reconstructed.

obligation_rationale.identity: A graph node must name a package.
obligation_rationale.version: A graph node must bind a package to a resolved coordinate.
obligation_rationale.source: A graph node needs source or namespace disambiguation.
obligation_rationale.integrity: A graph audit needs integrity evidence for serialized package records.
obligation_rationale.resolver_epoch: Graph interpretation depends on the lock format or resolver epoch.
obligation_rationale.dependency_edge: A dependency graph needs serialized dependency relations.
obligation_rationale.manager_metadata: Manager metadata identifies lock semantics and groups.
obligation_rationale.manifest_agreement: The graph must cover the manifest requirements being analyzed.
